memoryArtifacts.headline: Henri IV de Bar
memoryArtifacts.description:
Henri IV de Bar, né entre 1315 et 1320, mort en 1344, fut comte de Bar de 1336 à 1344. Il était fils d'Édouard Ier, comte de Bar, et de Marie de Bourgogne.

Cité une première fois en 1323 puis en 1329 …

Henri IV de Bar, né entre 1315 et 1320, mort en 1344, fut comte de Bar de 1336 à 1344. Il était fils d'Édouard Ier, comte de Bar, et de Marie de Bourgogne.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar於1317年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Édouard de Bar, Count of Bar26歲，母親Lady Marie Bourgogne Countess of Bar19歲。他和Yolande de Dampierre至少有2個兒子。他去世於1344年12月24日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年27歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar于1317年出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，他的父亲Édouard de Bar, Count of Bar26岁，母亲Lady Marie Bourgogne Countess of Bar19岁。他和Yolande de Dampierre至少有2个儿子。他去世于1344年12月24日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年27岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: IV,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written អ៊ីវ, unexplained. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number IV (meaning ‘the fourth’ of the four bearers of the name) may also be counted as a surname Iv.

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar was born in 1317, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Édouard de Bar, Count of Bar, was 26 and his mother, Lady Marie Bourgogne Countess of Bar, was 19. He had at least 2 sons with Yolande de Dampierre. He died on 24 December 1344, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 27, and was buried in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar est né en 1317, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Édouard de Bar, Count of Bar, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Marie Bourgogne Countess of Bar, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Yolande de Dampierre. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1344, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterré à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar 1317 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Édouard de Bar, Count of Bar 26 und seine Mutter Lady Marie Bourgogne Countess of Bar 19. Er hatte mit Yolande de Dampierre mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 24. Dezember 1344 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar è nato il nel 1317 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Édouard de Bar, Count of Bar, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Marie Bourgogne Countess of Bar, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Yolande de Dampierre. Morì il 24 dicembre 1344, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolto a Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri de Bar IV, Count of Barが1317年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Édouard de Bar, Count of Barは26歳，母Lady Marie Bourgogne Countess of Barは19歳であった。彼はYolande de Dampierreとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1344年12月24日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで27歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar(이)가 1317년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Édouard de Bar, Count of Bar(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Marie Bourgogne Countess of Bar(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Yolande de Dampierre(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1344년 12월 24일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar nasceu em 1317, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Édouard de Bar, Count of Bar, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marie Bourgogne Countess of Bar, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Yolande de Dampierre. Ele faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1344, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 27 anos, e foi sepultado em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar родился в 1317 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Édouard de Bar, Count of Bar было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marie Bourgogne Countess of Bar, 19. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Yolande de Dampierre. Он умер 24 декабря 1344 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 27 лет и был похоронен в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar nació en 1317, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Édouard de Bar, Count of Bar, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Marie Bourgogne Countess of Bar, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Yolande de Dampierre. Murió el 24 de diciembre de 1344, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultado en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.
